final_text:
Loan Management System

Business Summary

The Loan Management System is designed to streamline the process of loan application, approval, and management for financial institutions.

Actors

  • Customers
  • Loan Officers
  • Underwriters
  • Accountants

Functional Requirements

  • Customer account management
  • Loan application submission
  • Document upload and management
  • Loan approval workflow
  • Disbursement and repayment tracking

Non-Functional Requirements

  • High availability
  • Scalability
  • Security
  • Performance

Technology Stack

  • Frontend: React
  • Backend: Node.js
  • Database: PostgreSQL
  • Cloud: AWS

Architecture Pattern

Microservices architecture

Modules

  • Authentication
  • Customer Management
  • Loan Application
  • Document Management
  • Approval Workflow
  • Disbursement and Repayment

Entities

  • Customer
  • Loan
  • Document
  • User

APIs

  • RESTful APIs for frontend-backend communication

Integrations

  • Third-party credit scoring services
  • Payment gateways

Security Summary

  • OAuth2 for authentication
  • Encryption for data at rest and in transit
  • Regular security audits

Developer Handoff

Detailed API documentation and code examples

QA Handoff

Comprehensive test cases and automated testing scripts

Deployment Handoff

CI/CD pipeline setup and deployment instructions
